extensionDescription.message: Automatically darkens mostly-light pages and lets you persist a per-site override.

popupEnabledGloballyDescription.message: Turn extension behavior on or off everywhere.

popupInvertImagesDescription.message: Leave media inverted with the page instead of restoring original colors.

popupImproveContrastDescription.message: Slightly boost brightness and contrast while inverted.

popupSiteUnavailable.message: Site settings are unavailable on this page.

actionForcedInverted.message: Smart Dark Mode: forced inverted for this site

actionForcedOriginal.message: Smart Dark Mode: forced original for this site

actionAutomaticInverted.message: Smart Dark Mode: automatic, inverted this page
